title: About Danny | Danny Beales MP
meta_description: It is the honour of my life to have been elected as the first ever Labour Member of Parliament for Uxbridge and South Ruislip. This is where I was born, where I was raised, and where I still call home today.
headings: h2: NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE?
text_excerpt: --> About Danny | Danny Beales MP top of page Home Latest News About Danny Monthly Newsletter Help for Constituents Get in touch Services Directory More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. ABOUT DANNY Danny was born in Hillingdon Hospital and lived in South Ruislip up until he was made homeless - where he had to leave the area. After being the first person in his family to be accepted to university he returned to London. ​ Since then he has worked with Local Government for 10 years, delivering over 1000 new homes - providing a safe, secure place to live for children who grew up like him and helping tackle the country's housing crisis. Before being elected as a Member of Parliament, Danny worked in the health care sector for charities. Since being elected to Parliament, he has been elected as a member of the Health and Social Care Select Committee and has used his position to challenge officials on failing dentistry services, the desperate need for our new Hillingdon Hospital, and modernising the NHS. Danny also serves as a member of the All Party Parliamentary Group for Ending Homelessness and for Temporary Accommodation - using his professional and personal experience to further advocate for those at risk of homelessness. NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE? My team and I are here to help in any way we can. Click the button below to raise an issue with us.
